response.justification: While Bogdan brings 20 years of engineering experience with strong performance optimization and embedded systems background, he lacks the core domain expertise required for this role. The resume contains no evidence of SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture experience, AI accelerator optimization, or deep learning workload analysis—all explicitly required. His AI experience at Stripe appears to be agent frameworks and tooling rather than hardware-level AI accelerator optimization.
strengths: Extensive systems-level performance optimization experience including low-latency async I/O, caching, and high-throughput architecture design
Demonstrated embedded systems and hardware development background, including robotic arm controllers and low-level C/C++ components
20+ years of progressive technical leadership with multiple senior/staff roles spanning web, backend, and infrastructure domains
concerns: Complete absence of SoC and IP modeling experience, which is a core required skill for the role
No background in GPU architecture, AI accelerator design, or deep neural network inference/training optimization
Career primarily focused on application and backend software layers rather than hardware-software co-design at the architectural level

key_factors.factor: GPU and AI accelerator architecture knowledge
